# majia-meeting-svg

> Claude Code Skill that converts meeting transcripts into mobile-friendly SVG summary cards with auto PNG export.

## What it does

Takes multi-party meeting transcripts (voice-to-text or verbatim notes) and produces a structured SVG card with color-coded sections, checkbox action items, timeline milestones, and risk callouts. Automatically converts to PNG (2x Retina) for instant sharing via WeChat, DingTalk, Feishu, or any IM.

## Install

```
gh skill install maojiebc/majia-meeting-svg
```

## Links

- GitHub: https://github.com/maojiebc/majia-meeting-svg
- skills.sh: https://skills.sh/maojiebc/majia-meeting-svg
